CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Alice', NOW());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, created_at) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NOW());

CREATE PROCEDURE test_procedure (IN tb VARCHAR) BEGIN DECLARE state, msg, descs, rows ANY; state := '00000'; EXEC (sprintf('SELECT * FROM %s WHERE name LIKE ''%%A%%''', tb), state, msg, vector(), 1, descs, rows); IF (state <> '00000') SIGNAL (state, msg); IF (LENGTH(rows) = 0) RETURN 1; ELSE RETURN 0; END;
EXEC (sprintf('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table'), state, msg, vector(), 1, descs, rows);
EXEC (sprintf('SELECT name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE id = test_table.id) AS count FROM test_table ORDER BY name DESC'), state, msg, vector(), 1, descs, rows);
CREATE TABLE others (id INT PRIMARY KEY, test_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
EXEC (sprintf('SELECT a.name, b.test_id FROM test_table a JOIN others b ON a.id = b.test_id WHERE a.created_at > ''2023-01-01'''), state, msg, vector(), 1, descs, rows);
EXEC (sprintf('SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT test_id FROM others)'), state, msg, vector(), 1, descs, rows);
EXEC (sprintf('UPDATE test_table SET name = ''Charlie'' WHERE id = 2 RETURNING *'), state, msg, vector(), 1, descs, rows);

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE check_empty (IN table_name VARCHAR) BEGIN DECLARE state, msg, descs, rows ANY; EXEC (sprintf('SELECT 1 FROM %s LIMIT 1', table_name), state, msg, vector(), 1, descs, rows); IF (state <> '00000') SIGNAL (state, msg); IF (LENGTH(rows) = 0) RETURN 1; ELSE RETURN 0; END;
